name: morph-kpi-dashboard
description: A compact KPI widget that morphs into a full analytics dashboard: the surface springs between the two sizes while the KPI trigger and the Card swap through AnimatePresence — both get real enter and exit. Inside, a header with a period Badge, a row of KPI stat tiles with coloured trend deltas, a bar chart whose columns grow from the baseline, a Separator and a report-link Button stagger in on open and reverse-stagger out on close. Built on framer-motion via block-motion, so the whole morph collapses to a plain crossfade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: The collapsed widget is a single labelled toggle ("Open analytics dashboard" + aria-expanded); the expanded card carries a labelled close control, so both states are keyboard- and screen-reader-reachable
The dashboard title renders as plain text (not a heading) so it never forces a heading level onto the host page, and the KPI tiles are grouped with an accessible group label

The bar chart is a role=img with an aria-label summarising the trend; its columns, arrows and the sparkline are decorative and aria-hidden, and trend colour is paired with a +/- delta so it never relies on colour alone
The size/stagger morph respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider, collapsing to a plain crossfade

intents: a compact KPI or stat widget that expands into an analytics dashboard
a morph from a single metric card to a full dashboard with a chart
an animated analytics overview built on ibirdui
